titleEn: Tested: first Einböck intra-row precision hoe
titleZh: 首台Einböck行内精准中耕机测试
summaryZh: 本文报道了奥地利中耕机专家Einböck推出的新型Invera行内精准中耕机在荷兰甜菜田的首次田间测试。尽管在潮湿条件下摄像头深度控制遇到困难，但通过平板调整后，机器以约2km/h的速度成功在甜菜植株周围进行精准除草。该机器采用捷克Ullmanna公司的植物识别技术，结合Claas Culticam摄像头，代表了智能农业中精准除草技术的最新进展。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了精准农业中行内除草技术的最新突破，结合AI视觉识别与自动化控制，对智慧畜牧行业中的种植业环节（如饲料作物管理）具有重要参考价值。
contentFull: Tested: first Einböck intra-row precision hoe 23-06 | Crop solutions | ArticleLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintUnder challenging, wet conditions, the 4-row Einböck Invera made its first passes in a sugar beet field in Eexterveen (Drenthe) on 9 June. Partly because of the wet conditions, the cameras initially had some difficulty controlling the depth adjustment per element properly. While Christiaan Borkus of importer Reesink Agri made the final adjustments on the tablet, the blades nevertheless hoed neatly around the beet plants at about 2 km/h. Photos: Hans BanusIn a market that is currently, to put it mildly, on its knees, Austrian hoeing specialist Einböck is presenting its new Invera intra-row precision hoe. Perhaps its strongest asset is plant recognition from the Czech company Ullmanna. This makes the Invera even more distinctive. With Einböck, Dutch importer Reesink Agri has always had a strong card to play when it comes to hoeing technology. The machines are known for being solid and robust. And in combination with a Claas Culticam camera andLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint René Koerhuis Precision Farming SpecialistMore abouthoeingweed controladLEARN MORERelated articlesPremium08-06 | ArticleThe art(s) of laser weeding demystified: laser expert Matthias Lautenschläger explains03-06 | NewsYamaha Agriculture adds herbicide spraying to Prospr robotPremium26-05 | ArticleNo chemicals, no workers: The future of weed control is coming to Australia26-05 | NewsCropr introduces autonomous laser weeder Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
在具有挑战性的潮湿条件下，4行Einböck Invera于6月9日在Eexterveen（德伦特省）的一块甜菜田完成了首次作业。部分由于潮湿条件，摄像头最初在正确控制每个元件的深度调节方面遇到了一些困难。当进口商Reesink Agri的Christiaan Borkus在平板上进行最终调整时，刀片仍以约2公里/小时的速度整齐地在甜菜植株周围进行中耕。

在一个目前可以说是处于低谷的市场中，奥地利中耕机专家Einböck正在推出其新型Invera行内精准中耕机。其最强大的资产或许是来自捷克公司Ullmanna的植物识别技术。这使得Invera更具特色。对于Einböck，荷兰进口商Reesink Agri在中耕技术方面一直握有一张好牌。这些机器以坚固耐用而闻名。再结合Claas Culticam摄像头和
author: René Koerhuis
contentHtml: In a market that is currently, to put it mildly, on its knees, Austrian hoeing specialist Einböck is presenting its new Invera intra-row precision hoe.
